name: Change Manager
description: Maximizes successful service and product changes by assessing risks, authorizing changes, and managing the change schedule while balancing speed with risk management.
valueChainActivity: Design and Transition, Obtain/Build, Deliver and Support

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions changes, RFCs, CAB, rollbacks, or change risk assessments
change-collision-check — Detects scheduling collisions on weekdays at 07:00
change-pir-overdue — Checks for overdue post-implementation reviews on Wednesdays at 09:00
monday-cab-prep — Prepares CAB meeting agenda and materials every Monday at 07:00
emergency-change-fast-track — Monitors for emergency change requests every 15 minutes

actions.name: manage-change-record
actions.description: Create, update, query, or close change records (RFCs)

inputs.name: action
inputs.description: Operation: create, update, query, or close

inputs.name: changeId
inputs.description: Change record ID for update/query/close operations

inputs.name: details
inputs.description: Change details (type, risk, description, implementation plan)

outputs.name: changeRecord
outputs.description: The change record with current state

actions.name: check-change-calendar
actions.description: View, schedule, and detect conflicts in the change schedule

inputs.name: dateRange
inputs.description: Start and end dates to query

inputs.name: changeId
inputs.description: Specific change to check for conflicts

outputs.name: schedule
outputs.description: Scheduled changes in the date range

actions.name: assess-change-risk
actions.description: Calculate change risk scores based on configurable criteria

actions.name: query-ci-impact
actions.description: Query CI relationships and impact topology from CMDB

outputs.name: affectedServices
outputs.description: Business services affected by the change

actions.name: manage-cab-workflow
actions.description: Manage CAB meeting agendas, votes, and authorization records

actions.name: send-change-notification
actions.description: Send change communications and approval requests

actions.name: track-deployment
actions.description: Interface with deployment tools for implementation tracking

inputs.name: changeId
inputs.description: Change record to track deployment for

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Failed changes create incidents; incidents may trigger emergency changes
Problem resolutions often require changes; change failures may trigger problems
Changes must consider SLA impact; maintenance windows aligned to SLA terms
CMDB updated post-change; CI impact analysis informs risk assessment
Change models and PIR outcomes feed knowledge base
Changes may be bundled into releases; release plans drive change scheduling

hitlControls.reason: CAB or change authority must approve before implementation
ECAB must approve; post-implementation review required
Human decision required before triggering rollback
Moving changes into frozen/blackout periods requires human approval
New standard change models require human review
Changes affecting multiple business services require additional sign-off

knowledgeSources.description: Change records, RFCs, and authorization history
Configuration items and service dependency maps
Risk scoring criteria and NIST CM-3 controls reference
